[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000101100 3
1 000000000 a
2 000000000 a
3 000000000 a
4 000000000 a
5 001001001 3
6 000101100 3
7 100000100 2

01 10 100001100 3
12 21 100000100 2 match 7
23 32 100000000 1

56 65 000000000 a match 1 2 3 4
67 76 001001001 3 match 5
70 07 001001111 5

02 20 100000100 2 match 7

24 42 110000100 3
35 53 000000000 a match 1 2 3 4
46 64 001000000 1
57 75 000100010 2

71 17 000101100 3 match 0 6
